Disclaimer

  2. /Disclaimer

Disclaimer

All content on tbrelo.com is for informational purposes only and should not be considered professional advice of any kind. Here's what that means in practical terms.

Real Estate Information

Market data, home prices, neighborhood details, and community descriptions on this site are approximations based on publicly available data and local knowledge. Real estate markets change frequently — sometimes weekly.

For current, accurate real estate advice tailored to your situation, contact a licensed real estate professional. Barrett Henry is a licensed REALTOR and Broker Associate at REMAX Collective with 23+ years of experience in Tampa Bay. Visit nowtb.com or call (813) 733-7907.

Financial and Tax Information

Florida's tax advantages are a big reason people relocate here, and we cover topics like the lack of state income tax, homestead exemptions, and cost-of-living comparisons. These are general guidance, not tax advice. Tax laws change, exemptions have specific qualifications, and your situation is unique.

Consult a qualified tax professional or CPA for advice specific to your financial situation.

School Information

School ratings, boundary information, and program details referenced on this site are sourced from public data and can change from year to year. School zones are redrawn, ratings get updated, and programs come and go.

Always verify current school zoning with the relevant county school district (Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco, Manatee, or Polk) before making housing decisions based on school assignments.

Accuracy and Completeness

We make every effort to keep content on this site accurate and up-to-date. However, we make no warranties or guarantees about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of any information published here. Tampa Bay is a fast-changing region, and details can become outdated between updates.

External Links

We link to third-party websites throughout this site for your convenience and reference. These links do not constitute an endorsement, and we do not control or take responsibility for the content, privacy practices, or accuracy of external sites.

Affiliate Links

Some links on this site are affiliate links, meaning we may earn a commission if you click through and make a purchase or sign up for a service. This comes at no additional cost to you. See our Affiliate Disclosure for full details.

This Site Does Not Replace Professional Advice

Nothing on tbrelo.com is a substitute for professional real estate, legal, financial, or tax advice. We provide relocation information to help you make more informed decisions, but those decisions should be made with the guidance of qualified professionals who understand your specific circumstances.

Contact

Have a question, spot an error, or want to report outdated information? Contact us at barrett@nowtb.com. We appreciate the help keeping things accurate.

TBRelo

Your complete guide to relocating to Tampa Bay, Florida. Covering Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco, Hernando, Polk, Manatee, Sarasota, and Citrus counties with honest, local insight from someone who actually lives here.
